title: G1 Transformers Megatron
subtitle: 1984 Original Release — Complete With Accessories
description:
Original 1984 G1 Megatron. All accessories present: fusion cannon, silencer, scope, stock, and both sniper barrels. Chrome is bright with minor collector wear. Transforms cleanly, joints tight.

A true centerpiece for any G1 collection. Ships in a reinforced carton with foam padding.
